---
title: "AI-Enhanced Formative Assessment in Introductory Biology"
date: 2026-03-15
categories: [AI, Assessment, Biology Education]
---

[Pearson Biology Learning Conference 2026](https://www.pearson.com)

---

**Reuther, K.** (2026). *AI-Enhanced Formative Assessment in Introductory Biology*. Pearson Biology Learning Conference (BLC). March 2026.

Presentation on using AI tools to deliver scalable formative feedback in large-enrollment introductory biology courses, featuring Schema Study and lessons learned from classroom research.
